docs.title: Home Command
docs.text: Complete smart home manual — Home Assistant on HAOS

docs.title: The House
docs.text: 3-floor, ~4,800 sq ft, built 2006. Home Assistant OS running on a local Mini S13 PC, remotely accessible via Nabu Casa cloud. All config is version-controlled in this repository.

docs.title: System at a Glance
docs.text: Layer What's running Hub Home Assistant OS 2026.5 — local network + Nabu Casa remote Zigbee ZHA with ZBT-2 USB dongle (channel 25) — ~15 devices Z-Wave Z-Wave JS — smoke detectors (planned), smart locks (planned) Climate 2× Ecobee thermostats (2nd + 3rd floor active; 1st floor pending install) Cameras 2× Ring Indoor + 2× Ring Outdoor Solar (pending) + 1× Wyze v3 (office) Security Konnected Alarm Panel Pro (purchased, not yet installed) Lighting Inovelli Blue Series Zigbee rollout in progress — outdoor batch installed Energy EM16P dual-panel monitors (pending install) + plug-level monitoring Voice Alexa (primary) + Apple Home (secondary via HomeKit Bridge) Automations 27+ automations across leak detection, presence, TOU energy, security

docs.title: Quick Navigation
docs.text:
• Architecture

    System topology, integrations, protocols, and how everything connects.

  • Hardware

    Complete inventory of every device — installed, pending, and on-hand.

  • Automations

    All 27+ automations documented — triggers, conditions, actions.

  • Climate

    Ecobee thermostats, Eco+ TOU pre-conditioning, dashboard cards.

  • Cameras

    Ring perimeter layer + Wyze interior layer — streams, motion, dashboard.

  • Lighting

    Inovelli Blue Series Zigbee switch rollout — phases, locations, status.

  • Security & Alarm

    Konnected panel, leak sensors, mock door automations, smoke detectors.

  • Energy

    EM16P monitors, TOU rate sensors, plug-level power tracking.

  • Network

    Eero mesh, TP-Link switch, MoCA backbone, Zigbee coordinator placement.

  • Entity Reference

    Quick-lookup table of all key entity IDs by domain.

docs.title: Project Status
docs.text:
See PLAN.md for the live execution plan. High-level:

Project Status House Energy — EM16P Active — overdue install Climate — 1st floor Ecobee Ready — hardware in hand Cameras (Ring + Wyze) In progress Alarm System (Konnected) Ready — hardware in hand Inovelli Lighting — Outdoor In hand — ready to install Inovelli Lighting — Indoor Ordered one batch at a time after outdoor done Smoke Detectors Ready to order Smart Locks On hold — clear backlog first Wyze Cameras Complete Gas Fireplace Deferred — seasonal

Keeping this manual current

This documentation is auto-deployed from the main branch on every push. Whenever a project advances or config changes, the relevant page here is updated in the same commit.

docs.title: HA Instance
docs.text: Property Value Platform Home Assistant OS (HAOS) Version 2026.5.4 Hardware Mini S13 PC (x86-64) — in structured media cabinet Local access http://homeassistant.local:8123 Remote access Nabu Casa (URL stored in secrets.yaml) Config storage /config/ on HAOS — version-controlled at this repo

docs.title: Integration Map
docs.text:
graph TD
    HA[Home Assistant OS]

    HA --- ZHA[ZHA — Zigbee<br/>ZBT-2 dongle, ch 25]
    HA --- ZW[Z-Wave JS<br/>USB dongle]
    HA --- ESP[ESPHome<br/>Garage door openers]
    HA --- RING[Ring Integration<br/>Cameras + Chimes]
    HA --- ECO[Ecobee Integration<br/>2× thermostats]
    HA --- SONOS[Sonos Integration<br/>2× speakers]
    HA --- INFLUX[InfluxDB 1.x<br/>Time-series storage]
    HA --- HK[HomeKit Bridge<br/>Whitelist-only]
    HA --- ALEXA[Alexa / Amazon<br/>Voice interface]
    HA --- MOBILE[Mobile App<br/>iOS — 2 phones]
    HA --- MQTT[MQTT / Mosquitto<br/>Thingino cameras]

    INFLUX --- GRAFANA[Grafana<br/>Analytics dashboards]
    HK --- APPLE[Apple Home<br/>Secondary UI]
    ALEXA --- ECHO[Echo devices<br/>throughout house]
    ZHA --- INOVELLI[Inovelli Blue Series<br/>Zigbee switches]
    ZHA --- LEAK[Leak sensors<br/>7× ZHA]
    ZW --- SMOKE[Smoke detectors<br/>planned — Z-Wave]
    RING --- CAMS[Ring cameras<br/>2× indoor active]
    RING --- CHIMES[Ring Chime V3<br/>4× active as sirens]
    ECO --- THERM[Ecobee thermostats<br/>2nd + 3rd floor]

docs.title: Zigbee — ZHA
docs.text:
• Coordinator: ZBT-2 USB dongle on Sabrent USB hub + extension cable
  • Channel: 25 (avoids 2.4 GHz WiFi overlap with channels 1, 6, 11)
  • Integration: ZHA (not Zigbee2MQTT — Z2M is installed but not running)
  • Devices: ~15 — Inovelli Blue Series switches, Third Reality leak sensors, mmWave sensors
  • Inovelli support: Full LED notification, multi-tap events, and parameter config via ZHA "Manage Zigbee Device"

Zigbee mesh health

Always pair mains-powered devices (switches, plugs) before battery sensors. Wait 24 hours after adding powered devices before testing signal — neighbor tables rebuild gradually.

docs.title: Z-Wave — Z-Wave JS
docs.text:
• Dongle installed, lightly used
  • Reserved for: smoke detectors (First Alert ZCOMBO-G), smart locks (Schlage BE469ZP)
  • No devices currently paired

docs.title: ESPHome
docs.text:
• 2× garage door openers (custom firmware)
  • Entities: cover.left_garage_door_opener_garage_door, cover.right_garage_door_opener_garage_door

Entity naming quirk

cover.left_garage_door_opener_garage_door is physically the right door — naming mismatch from installer. UI labels reflect physical reality.

docs.title: Ring
docs.text:
• 2× Ring Indoor Cams active (garage + personnel door)
  • 4× Ring Chime V3 active as siren.[name] entities
  • Cloud-based — streams and recordings go through Ring's servers
  • Only 2 tones available for chimes: ding and motion

docs.title: Ecobee
docs.text:
• Native HA integration
  • Also paired directly to Apple Home (bypasses HA HomeKit Bridge)
  • heat_cool mode (dual setpoint) on both units
  • Eco+ TOU enabled in Ecobee app — no HA setpoint automation runs

docs.title: MQTT / Mosquitto
docs.text:
• Mosquitto broker add-on running on HA
  • Used by: Thingino-flashed Wyze v3 camera (motion events, when configured)

docs.title: InfluxDB + Grafana
docs.text:
• InfluxDB 1.x — receives all HA state changes
  • Uses InfluxQL (not Flux) — Grafana data source configured accordingly
  • Grafana running as HA add-on — analytics dashboards for temperature, energy, presence

docs.title: Dashboard
docs.text:
• Name: Home Command Dashboard
  • Storage: /config/.storage/lovelace.home_command_dashboard (JSON) on HAOS
  • Reference copy: dashboard.yaml in this repo (not the live file)
  • Custom components: button-card, mushroom-climate-card, mushroom-title-card, apexcharts-card
  • Tabs: Overview · Energy · Climate · Security · Audio · Health · Lighting · Sleep

docs.title: Dashboard Edit Workflow
docs.text:
# 1. Pull fresh copy before editing
ssh root@192.168.x.x "cat /config/.storage/lovelace.home_command_dashboard" > /tmp/lovelace_dashboard.json

# 2. Edit via Python script in /tmp/

# 3. Push and restart immediately (race condition: HA may overwrite on shutdown)
scp /tmp/lovelace_dashboard.json root@192.168.x.x:/config/.storage/lovelace.home_command_dashboard
ssh root@192.168.x.x "ha core restart"

docs.title: File Layout
docs.text: File Role configuration.yaml Main HA config — includes, TOU sensors, input_boolean.peak_mode, MQTT binary sensors configuration_tou_addition.yaml TOU sensors + notification URL sensors — loaded as HA package automations.yaml Single source of truth for all automations (27+) homekit.yaml HomeKit bridge entity whitelist influxdb_ha.yaml InfluxDB domain/entity include-exclude list scripts.yaml Alexa-invocable garage scripts secrets.yaml Gitignored — all secret values; never committed secrets.yaml.template Template listing every required secret key dashboard.yaml Reference copy only — NOT the live dashboard projects/ Detailed design docs per project
